action.reasoning: Observation: adding eight extra ConvNeXt seeds reduced hidden balanced accuracy from 0.7668 to 0.7584; stdout shows one extra member was very weak on validation (seed555 val 0.648), while seed666 was strong (val 0.726) and seed3333/888 were reasonable. Analysis: uniform inclusion of all new members diluted the good ensemble, but selectively adding only the strongest new member may retain complementarity without the weak-member penalty. Decision: build an ensemble from the current best 9 ConvNeXt members plus seed666 only and submit it for hidden evaluation.
